name: phoenix-er-tests
description: Devnet E2E tests for Phoenix CLOB + MagicBlock Ephemeral Rollup integration

scripts.test: NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx' yarn run mocha --timeout 1000000 tests-ts/anchor/phoenix_er.ts
scripts.test:devnet: ANCHOR_PROVIDER_URL=https://api.devnet.solana.com NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx' yarn run mocha --timeout 1000000 tests-ts/anchor/phoenix_er.ts
